hero.title: Embers of the Uncrowned Wiki
hero.description: Reclaim House Harborwell in a dark fantasy isometric MMORPG where class combat, companions, domain bosses, raids, settlement growth and bloodline progression shape your path through an elven invasion.

gameFeature.title: Embers of the Uncrowned Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Master manual isometric combat across three classes, fight domain bosses and raids, grow companions, and rebuild House Harborwell in a dark fantasy action MMORPG on Steam.

embersCodesAndRewards.title: Embers of the Uncrowned Codes and Rewards
embersCodesAndRewards.subtitle: Track official rewards, Steam wishlist bonuses, demo access rewards and community drops from the official Embers of the Uncrowned channels.
embersCodesAndRewards.intro: Embers of the Uncrowned centers its public reward flow around Steam wishlist participation, the Steam Next Fest demo and official community channels. This module collects every official reward path in one place so you can claim each bonus directly from the confirmed sources.

items.label: Steam Wishlist Mount Reward
items.claimMethod: Add Embers of the Uncrowned to your Steam wishlist and follow the official wishlist event instructions to claim the mount when the demo opens.

items.label: Free Steam Demo Access
items.claimMethod: Open the Embers of the Uncrowned Demo page on Steam and choose Install Demo.

items.label: Official Redeem Codes
items.reward: Future code drops and launch rewards
items.claimMethod: Use the Steam news page, Discord and the X account for reward posts tied to events and launch campaigns.

items.label: Discord and Social Reward Watch
items.reward: Community event updates and announcement drops
items.claimMethod: Join the official Discord and follow PlayEOTU on X for reward posts tied to events or launch campaigns.

embersReleaseDemoRequirements.title: Embers of the Uncrowned Release Date, Demo and System Requirements
embersReleaseDemoRequirements.subtitle: Find the official Steam links, demo status, PC requirements, supported languages, anti-cheat note and playable window in one clean table.
embersReleaseDemoRequirements.intro: Embers of the Uncrowned is a dark fantasy MMORPG from NEXON, with the full game marked Coming soon and a free demo available on Steam. The table below collects the practical facts in one place so you can check release status, demo access, languages and PC requirements at a glance.

items.playerAction: Wishlist the full game on Steam to receive release updates.
Install the demo from the Steam demo page.
Use the dedicated demo page for installation.
Play during the event window and follow Steam news for updates.
Use the Steam client for download and updates.
Follow NEXON and PlayEOTU channels for official announcements.

items.officialDetail: Action, Massively Multiplayer, RPG; MMO, Online PvP, Online Co-op
items.playerAction: Expect online play, multiplayer boss content, raids and PvP-related systems.

items.officialDetail: English full audio, interface and subtitles; German, Spanish-Spain, Portuguese-Brazil, Russian and Simplified Chinese interface and subtitles
items.playerAction: Check the Steam language table before downloading.

items.officialDetail: Uses kernel-level NGS (Nexon Game Security), requiring manual removal after uninstall
items.playerAction: Review the Steam anti-cheat note before installing.
Use online features with normal multiplayer account safety.

items.officialDetail: Windows 11 64-bit, Intel i5-3570 or AMD FX-8350, 8 GB RAM, GTX 1060 or RX 580 or Intel Arc A380, DirectX 11, broadband internet, 30 GB storage
items.playerAction: Use this as the baseline for launching the demo.

items.officialDetail: Windows 11 64-bit, Intel i5-9600 or Ryzen 5 2600X, 16 GB RAM, RTX 2060 or RX 5700 XT or Intel Arc A770, DirectX 11, broadband internet, 30 GB storage
items.playerAction: Use this target for smoother demo play.

embersBeginnerGuideControls.title: Embers of the Uncrowned Beginner Guide and Controls
embersBeginnerGuideControls.subtitle: Start the demo with the right Steam page, class choice, controls, combat loop, co-op content and early story objectives.
embersBeginnerGuideControls.intro: Embers of the Uncrowned is built around manual isometric combat, precise evasion, boss interruption windows, class mechanics, companions and settlement progression. Start here to set up the demo correctly and learn the core systems before your first session.

items.title: Install the Correct Demo
items.description: Use the official Embers of the Uncrowned Demo page on Steam and choose Install Demo. The full game page is separate and remains marked Coming soon.

items.title: Pick a Starting Class
items.description: Choose from Executioner, Spectral Blade and Stormbringer. Executioner uses a giant axe, Spectral Blade uses swift swordsmanship and phantoms, and Stormbringer uses wind and lightning magic.

items.title: Set Up Movement and Camera
items.description: The game supports keyboard and mouse controls and Xbox controller input. Keyboard play uses WASD-style movement, mouse actions and camera control, while controller play is shown in official controller gameplay.

items.title: Learn the Core Combat Loop
items.description: Basic attacks, active skills, evasion, interrupt timing and stagger windows drive combat. Evasion uses SP, interrupts break dangerous boss skills, and stagger creates burst-damage openings.

items.title: Map Your Skill Keys Early
items.description: Use easy-to-reach bindings for active skills, dodge, potions and bloodline abilities. The official controls guide emphasizes manual combat, so comfortable key placement matters from the first fight.

items.title: Use Potions and Survival Tools Carefully
items.description: HP and MP potions are part of the basic combat flow. Save defensive movement and recovery options for boss patterns rather than spending everything on small hits.

items.title: Follow the Demo Objectives
items.description: The Steam Next Fest demo covers early progression from Goldenhaven, rebuilding the Amber Coast Settlement and forming alliances in Towerstead.

items.title: Try Multiplayer Content
items.description: The demo includes multiplayer-focused content such as field activities, matchmaking, domain bosses, raid content and arena battles.

items.title: Report Bugs Through Official Channels
items.description: Use Steam discussions and the official Discord for bug reports, demo feedback and updates from the development team.

embersClassTierListBuilds.title: Embers of the Uncrowned Class Tier List and Builds
embersClassTierListBuilds.subtitle: Compare Executioner, Stormbringer and Spectral Blade by first-hour comfort, role clarity, class mechanics, build identity and demo usefulness.
embersClassTierListBuilds.intro: The current demo class pool includes three playable classes: Executioner, Spectral Blade and Stormbringer. This tier grid ranks them for early demo onboarding, build clarity and first-hour comfort based on their confirmed mechanics.

items.coreMechanics: Build Rage through combat, trigger Fury for explosive tempo, pursuit and skill chains.
buildFocus: Physical boss damage with Shock and defense shredding
Physical AoE hunting with mobility and critical hits
items.bestFor: Players who want durable melee combat, clear resource flow, heavy burst windows and a straightforward first demo class.

items.role: Wind and lightning magic damage dealer
items.coreMechanics: Uses the dual forces of Wind and Lightning to control space and deliver magical pressure from safer positions.
items.bestFor: Players who prefer ranged magic, elemental burst and a clearer view of battlefield patterns during boss fights.

items.role: Mobile melee assassin and phantom duelist
items.coreMechanics: Generates and consumes Shade, chains skills with Phantoms, uses Stealth and position swaps for burst openings.
buildFocus: Physical Shade generation into finishing skills
Throwing Dart distance control with Shade-enhanced attacks
items.bestFor: Players who enjoy mobility, deception, combo routing and mechanical mastery.

embersSkillsGemsProgression.title: Embers of the Uncrowned Skills, Skill Gems and Progression
embersSkillsGemsProgression.subtitle: Progression in Embers of the Uncrowned starts with one of three playable classes and expands through active skills, passive systems, Skill Gems, gear enhancement and bloodline awakening.
embersSkillsGemsProgression.intro: Use this section as a practical class-growth path: choose a class, understand its combat style, build around active and passive skills, then connect Skill Gems, gear enhancement and bloodline awakening into one long-term power plan.

items.title: Choose a demo class
items.summary: The Steam Next Fest demo features Stormbringer, Executioner and Spectral Blade as playable classes.
details: Stormbringer uses wind and lightning magic for ranged magical pressure.
Executioner fights with a giant axe and focuses on heavy, crushing attacks.
Spectral Blade uses a longsword and fast swordsmanship for swift melee combat.

items.title: Learn active and passive skill progression
items.summary: Each playable class in the demo has 28-29 skills, with active and passive progression systems shaping how the class plays.
details: Active skills define moment-to-moment combat choices.
Passive progression supports class identity, survivability and damage style.
Different skill trees allow players to test distinct combat styles instead of locking every class into one fixed route.

items.title: Match skills to class identity
items.summary: The class system is built around unique skills and attributes, so class choice changes both combat rhythm and build direction.
details: Stormbringer favors magical burst and elemental pressure.
Executioner favors committed melee strikes and high-impact attacks.
Spectral Blade favors speed, sword combos and agile close-range damage.

items.title: Layer Skill Gems and gear enhancement
items.summary: Infinite Progression is centered on combining Skill Gems, enhancing gear and awakening bloodline power.
details: Skill Gems are part of the long-term character growth layer.
Gear enhancement adds another route for combat-power development.
Bloodline awakening connects the character's inherited power to late progression.

items.title: Push progression through demo content
items.summary: The demo includes three main story chapters, 34 side quests and over 480 minutes of total content for players aiming to reach maximum demo progression.
details: Main quests are positioned as the direct route through the demo.
Side quests expand progression while players explore regions and systems.
Region liberation, boss content and companion growth all feed back into the wider House Harborwell progression loop.

embersBossesRaidsCoop.title: Embers of the Uncrowned Bosses, Raids and Co-op
embersBossesRaidsCoop.subtitle: The demo highlights 12 boss monsters across Domain, Field, Defense of Spring and Raid encounters, plus multiplayer-focused field and matchmaking content.
embersBossesRaidsCoop.intro: This table separates each confirmed multiplayer activity by purpose, team focus and demo role, so players can quickly understand which fights are solo-adjacent field content and which ones expect coordinated group play.

items.demoDetail: Included among the 12 boss monsters in the demo
items.objective: Defeat bosses occupying the domain and support House restoration

items.playerSetup: Group play built around cooperation and tactics
items.demoDetail: Included among the 12 boss monsters in the demo
items.objective: Confront powerful bosses where victory depends on coordinated execution

items.demoDetail: Listed as one of the demo boss encounter categories
items.objective: Fight large threats while exploring liberated and contested regions

items.demoDetail: Listed as one of the demo boss encounter categories
items.objective: Defend a key objective while handling boss-level pressure

items.demoDetail: Previewed alongside raid, open-world event and arena content
items.objective: Test class control, positioning and combat timing against other players

items.demoDetail: The demo includes multiplayer-focused field and matchmaking content across three core regions and 10 explorable or liberatable regions
items.objective: Move from exploration into organized boss, raid and arena activities

embersCompanionsAffinity.title: Embers of the Uncrowned Companions and Affinity
embersCompanionsAffinity.subtitle: Companions are part of the combat loop. The demo centers companion progression around Eslyn, 17 companion skills and affinity-based exclusive questlines.
embersCompanionsAffinity.intro: This module turns the companion system into homepage-ready cards: who joins you, what they do in combat, how affinity adds quests and how companion growth supports class builds.

items.title: Eslyn
items.description: Eslyn is the companion highlighted for the demo, fighting alongside the player while supporting the campaign to rebuild House Harborwell.
items.playerValue: Gives the class build a second layer of battlefield support and story presence.

items.title: 17 Companion Skills
items.description: The demo companion system includes 17 companion skills, giving companion growth a clear mechanical role in combat planning.
items.playerValue: Lets players combine class skills with companion effects instead of treating companions as passive followers.

items.title: Affinity-Based Questlines
items.description: Companion progression includes affinity-based exclusive questlines centered around Eslyn.
items.playerValue: Turns relationship growth into playable content tied to quests and character development.

items.title: Combat Synergy
items.description: The official Steam description frames companions as allies who grow stronger with the player and create powerful synergies to bolster forces.
items.playerValue: Connects companion growth directly to class identity, party strength and long-term progression.

items.title: Settlement Connection
items.description: Official companion and settlement previews connect Eslyn and followers with rebuilding the fallen House Harborwell.
items.playerValue: Links companion progression to the wider house, settlement and territory systems.

embersHouseSettlementRegions.title: Embers of the Uncrowned House System, Settlement and Regions
embersHouseSettlementRegions.subtitle: The world structure is built around reclaiming a fallen domain, liberating regions, upgrading a settlement and turning House Harborwell's recovery into visible progression.
embersHouseSettlementRegions.intro: Use this section to understand the game's territory layer: the player returns as the rightful lord of House Harborwell, fights corrupted enemies and elven forces, then expands the house through exploration, buildings, resources and liberated regions.

items.title: House Harborwell
items.content: The player is the last hope for House Harborwell: an illegitimate child who left home to become a mercenary, then returns as the rightful lord to reclaim the lost domain.

items.title: Settlement Growth
items.content: The settlement starts as a humble camp and grows into a vibrant city as people gather, regions are liberated and the house's influence spreads.

items.title: Upgradeable Buildings
items.content: The demo includes seven different buildings that support enhancement, research, trade and crafting through upgradeable facilities.

items.title: Regions and Exploration
items.content: The demo includes three main regions and 10 regions available for liberation and exploration, giving the house system a map-based progression path.

items.title: Resources and Management
items.content: Region liberation and resource management expand progression opportunities, while settlement facilities turn exploration gains into practical upgrades.

items.title: Hidden Stories
items.content: The continent contains tragic stories and mysterious adventures, encouraging players to explore regions beyond the direct combat path.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Embers of the Uncrowned

questions.question: What is Embers of the Uncrowned?
questions.answer: Embers of the Uncrowned is a dark fantasy action MMORPG developed and published by NEXON, played from an isometric perspective on PC via Steam with manual combat, classes, companions, domain bosses and settlement growth.

questions.question: Is there a free demo for Embers of the Uncrowned?
questions.answer: Yes. Embers of the Uncrowned has a free Steam demo available during Steam Next Fest (June 15-22 PDT), installed directly from the dedicated demo page on Steam.

questions.question: What classes can I play in Embers of the Uncrowned?
questions.answer: The Embers of the Uncrowned demo features three playable classes: Executioner (heavy axe melee), Stormbringer (wind and lightning magic) and Spectral Blade (fast swordsmanship with phantoms and Stealth).

questions.question: Is Embers of the Uncrowned multiplayer or singleplayer?
questions.answer: Embers of the Uncrowned is an online MMORPG with MMO, Online Co-op and Online PvP features, including domain bosses, raids, field content, arena PvP and matchmaking.

questions.question: When does Embers of the Uncrowned fully release?
questions.answer: The full game of Embers of the Uncrowned is currently marked Coming soon on Steam. You can wishlist it to receive release updates while playing the free demo.

questions.question: Can I run Embers of the Uncrowned on my PC?
questions.answer: Embers of the Uncrowned runs on Windows 11 64-bit. The minimum spec is an Intel i5-3570 or AMD FX-8350 with 8 GB RAM and a GTX 1060 or RX 580, while the recommended spec targets an i5-9600 or Ryzen 5 2600X with 16 GB RAM and an RTX 2060 or RX 5700 XT, with 30 GB of storage.

questions.question: Where can I follow official Embers of the Uncrowned updates?
questions.answer: You can follow Embers of the Uncrowned through the official Steam news hub, the NEXON official site, the PlayEOTU Discord, and the PlayEOTU accounts on X, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook and TikTok.

questions.question: Does Embers of the Uncrowned support controllers?
questions.answer: Yes. Embers of the Uncrowned supports keyboard and mouse as well as Xbox controller input, with controller gameplay shown in official materials.

cta.title: Ready to Reclaim House Harborwell?
cta.description: Wishlist on Steam, play the demo, and join the official Embers of the Uncrowned Discord for classes, builds, raid, and settlement updates.
